_meta.note: Raw lint array (06/2026). PRE-LAUNCH context: 0005 unused_index fires for nearly every secondary index because there is no production query traffic yet (idx_scan=0). Treat 0005 as LOW/observational, NOT a directive to drop indexes that back FKs or known query paths.

lints.name: multiple_permissive_policies
lints.detail: Table public.blog_tags has multiple permissive policies for role authenticated for action SELECT. Policies include {blog_tags_admin_all, blog_tags_public_read}.

lints.name: unused_index
lints.note: PRE-LAUNCH NOISE — idx_scan=0 because no prod traffic. Keep unless redundant/duplicate.

_absent_lints_notable.0004_no_primary_key: NOT reported -> all public tables have PK.
_absent_lints_notable.0011_function_search_path_mutable: NOT reported -> functions likely have search_path pinned (verify Task 1.2 Step 4).
